summary: Fresh same-session economics on the current tree (post merge-fix 8fcd2d3c + M16.4 f0fe5aa7, with M15.x): MTP 35B-A3B and DFlash 35B-A3B remain BELOW AR (~0.5x / ~0.4x); DFlash 27B-dense + online whole-cycle gate is 1.161x AR. Qualitative picture unchanged: speculative wins on the dense model (expensive AR) and loses on the MoE model (cheap A3B AR). C_B improved (35B MTP B=3 5.46 -> 4.67).

mtp_35b_a3b.workload: quicksort prompt (90 tok), decode-tokens=32, chain-attn-mode=batched, proposal_impl=persistent_device

dflash_35b_a3b.workload: quicksort, decode-tokens=32, native_bulk_bplus1, full-attn-chain=batched, tree=chain, commit=branch_copy

dflash_27b_dense_gate.workload: 9 prompts, decode-tokens=64, draft-budget=4, top-k=2, native_bulk_bplus1, full-attn-chain=batched, commit=branch_copy, --whole-cycle-gate 0.90

commands.mtp_35b: ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_economics.py --model <35B> --prompt-tokens-file /tmp/quicksort-prompt-tokens.txt --decode-tokens 32 --candidate-budgets 3,5 --runs 1 --proposal-impl persistent_device --backend hip_gfx1100 --hip-arch gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode batched --graph-mode off
commands.dflash_35b: python3 scripts/dflash_chain_e2e_bench.py --target-model <35B> --drafter-model <z-lab/35B-A3B-DFlash> --backend hip_gfx1100 --max-prompts 1 --decode-tokens 32 --draft-budgets 4,8 --verifier-mode native_bulk_bplus1 --full-attn-chain-mode batched --verifier-graph off --tree-mode chain --canonical-commit-mode branch_copy
commands.dflash_27b: python3 scripts/dflash_chain_e2e_bench.py --target-model <z-lab/27B-PARO> --drafter-model <z-lab/27B-DFlash> --backend hip_gfx1100 --max-prompts 9 --decode-tokens 64 --draft-budgets 4 --draft-top-k 2 --verifier-mode native_bulk_bplus1 --full-attn-chain-mode batched --canonical-commit-mode branch_copy --adaptive-budget off --whole-cycle-gate 0.90

interpretation: C_B (verifier cycle cost) is roughly model-compute-bound, while AR-per-token is far cheaper on the A3B MoE (3B active) than the 27B dense. So speculative decode amortizes on the dense model (AR 32.5 tok/s -> 1.16x with gate) but not on the MoE (AR 103.5 tok/s -> 0.52x). To make MTP win on the 35B MoE at current acceptance, C_B must drop from 4.67 to <=2.385 (~halve) -- the M16 C_B<=2 goal; the lever is M16.3 (fewer/larger megakernels to cut the ~1200 launches/pass), since the verify cycle is ~35 ms dominated by dispatch, not the ~16 ms of kernel time M16.4 trimmed.
